name: Kikusui Electronics Corporation
summary: Kikusui Electronics Corporation manufactures, imports, exports, and sells electronic test and measuring instruments, power supplies, and software products in Japan and internationally. Its principal products include DC and AC power supplies, electronic loads, telecommunication measuring instruments, withstanding voltage testers, insulation testers, earth continuity testers, leakage current testers, calibrators, and signal generators. The company also offers power supply controllers, electrical safety testers, EMC testers, harmonics and flicker testers, fuel cell impedance meters, battery and capacitor testers, and rack mount accessories, as well as custom-made systems. In addition, it imports and sells digital communication, microwave, and avionics measuring instruments. The company was formerly known as Kikusui Denpa and changed its name to Kikusui Electronics Corporation in 1962. The company was incorporated in 1951 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
